adapters.name: development
adapters.status: intended; not yet implemented in Make_Skills
adapters.purpose: Customizes the core Agency-to-Structure Engine for software development repos: defines what to watch (repeated dev tasks, architecture corrections, naming patterns, module boundaries, UI/API workflow patterns, agent mistakes, project formation decisions). Future: when loom-platform builds its own showcase surfaces (per the Pillar 2 page roadmap), a `platform-showcase` adapter may be added alongside `development`.
